headline: DTE Energy Emerges as a Top AI Infrastructure Beneficiary
summary: Our 24/7 Wall St. price target for DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) is $161.25 over the next 12 months, implying 9.38% upside from the current price of $147.42. I rate DTE a buy with high confidence. The hyperscaler data center pipeline, expanded capital plan, and constructive Michigan regulatory backdrop give this defensive utility a credible path to ...
